retrieved_result: Will a "Programming Boot Camp" Help Me Get a Coding Job? Melanie Pinola4/03/15 11:00am Filed to: ask lifehacker 161 18Dear Lifehacker, I’m interested in getting a job as a programmer, but I don’t have any formal training. I heard boot camps can get me into a job in just a couple of months.
Decision_Reason: The result is about programming boot camps and job prospects, not about debugging or API integration.
